{"code":"(def created-issues (atom []))
(doseq [pr prs-with-linear]
  (let [issue-title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))
        result (github__create_issue {:repo "acme/web" :title issue-title})]
    (swap! created-issues conj result)))
(count @created-issues)"}
